full_text:
Hou Shilang (Xiaoming)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Hou Shilang, styledXiaoming, was born in Dong Laiye (modern day Shandong). Served in Wei and Jin administration. Hou Shilang was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom and the Jin Dynasty.
